Rules.InvariantScript:
// Unblock user input and clear 'add labor items' collection
Clear(colAddLaborItems);

Rules.InvariantScript:
Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Notes", Icon: Icon.Note, Screen: App.ActiveScreen}
)

ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People}
)
If(Self.Layout = Layout.Horizontal, Min(280, Self.Width - 60), Min(280, Self.Height - 60))

Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen}
)

Rules.InvariantScript:
SortByColumns(
    Filter(
        colCdsMarketLaborItems,
        'Labor Item'.Type = gal_LaborAddItems__Filter.Selected.Value And 'Market Segment'.'Market Segment' = gblRecordJobCurrent.'Market Segment'.'Market Segment'
    ),
    "appLaborDisplayOrder",
    SortOrder.Ascending
)
If(ThisItem.'Market Labor Item' in colAddLaborItems.'Market Labor Item', gblAppColors.Secondary.White,gblAppStyles.Card.TitleColor)
If(ThisItem.'Market Labor Item' in colAddLaborItems.'Market Labor Item', gblAppStyles.Status.Neutral, gblAppStyles.Card.Fill)

If(IsBlank(LookUp(colAddLaborItems, 'Market Labor Item'= ThisItem.'Market Labor Item')), Collect(colAddLaborItems, LookUp(colCdsMarketLaborItems, 'Market Labor Item'=ThisItem.'Market Labor Item')), Remove(colAddLaborItems, LookUp(colCdsMarketLaborItems, 'Market Labor Item'=ThisItem.'Market Labor Item')))
